channel.title: Michael Ibragimchayev on Chayev
channel.description: Recent content in Michael Ibragimchayev on Chayev

item.title: Bridges Between Code and Prose
item.description: An introductory reflection exploring how the structured logic of enterprise software development informs the narrative architecture of writing a memoir.

item.title: Get In Touch
item.description: I would love to hear from you. Whether you are an editor, developer, colleague, or reader, feel free to reach out. Connect Directly LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/chayev GitHub: github.com/chayev Twitter: twitter.com/chayev You can also send a direct message using the form, and I will get back to you as soon as possible.

item.title: Projects
item.description: Ping — personal CRM app MissionsPerformance.org — mission performance reviews Automation — n8n workflows and utilities
